zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stanhope於1409年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾藍普頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Stanhope31歲，母親Isabella Markham31歲。他於1429年與Elizabeth Talbot在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾藍普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1449年在英國諾廷加姆爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1493年12月12日在他的家鄉享年84歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾藍普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stanhope于1409年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾藍普頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard Stanhope31岁，母亲Isabella Markham31岁。他于1429年与Elizabeth Talbot在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾藍普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1449年在英国諾廷加姆爾被列为member of parliament。他去世于1493年12月12日在他的家乡享年84岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾藍普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stanhope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Stanhope (Durham), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + hop ‘valley’.

History: A family of this name have held the title Earl of Harrington since 1742, and were Earls of Chesterfield from 1628–1967. Philip Stanhope, 1st Earl of Chesterfield, was a Royalist soldier in the English Civil War. He was captured in 1643 and died in prison in 1656.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Stanhope was born in 1409, in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Stanhope, was 31 and his mother, Isabella Markham, was 31. He married Elizabeth Talbot in 1429, in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. In 1449, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Nottinghamshire, England. He died on 12 December 1493, in his hometown, at the age of 84, and was buried in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stanhope est né en 1409, à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Stanhope, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabella Markham, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Talbot en 1429, à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. En 1449, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1493, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stanhope 1409 in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Stanhope 31 und seine Mutter Isabella Markham 31. Er hat 1429 in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1449 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament in Nottinghamshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1493 im Alter von 84 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stanhope è nato il nel 1409 nel Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Stanhope, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Markham, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Talbot nel 1429, nel Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1449, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Nottinghamshire, England. Morì il 12 dicembre 1493, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stanhopeが1409年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Stanhopeは31歳，母Isabella Markhamは31歳であった。1429年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンでElizabeth Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1449年，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1493年12月12日に故郷で84歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stanhope(이)가 1409년 영국 노틴그함실르 램프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Stanhope(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Markham(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 램프턴에서 Elizabeth Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1449년, 그의 직업은 영국 노틴그함실르에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1493년 12월 12일 그의 고향에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 램프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stanhope nasceu em 1409, em Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Stanhope, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Markham, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Talbot em 1429, em Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1449, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1493, em sua cidade natal, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stanhope родился в 1409 г. в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Stanhope было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella Markham, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Talbot в 1429 г. в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1449 году он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. Он умер 12 декабря 1493 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stanhope nació en 1409, en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Stanhope, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabella Markham, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Talbot en 1429, en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1449, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1493, en su pueblo, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
